expectations.evidence: Line 30-32: uses settings.acceptedDocuments = [IdCapture.document(.driverLicenseOrId, .unitedStatesOfAmerica)] — wrong API style, not DriverLicense(region: .us).

expectations.text: Uses SingleSideScanner with enablingBarcode: true and machineReadableZone: false and visualInspectionZone: false — does NOT use FullDocumentScanner
expectations.evidence: Line 33-37: the scanner flags are correct (barcode: true, mrz: false, viz: false) but it is assigned directly as settings.scannerType = SingleSideScanner(...), bypassing IdCaptureScanner wrapping — which is the hallmark of the wrong SDK version / invented API.

expectations.text: Wraps the scanner in IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: SingleSideScanner(...))
expectations.evidence: No IdCaptureScanner wrapper is used anywhere in the file. The SingleSideScanner is assigned directly to settings.scannerType, which is not the correct API.
